title: Winda
content:
{{Top|ca|legends=Winda Warrick}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Winda-2024Ewoks4.png]] |name=Winda |homeworld= |birth=No earlier than [[7 BBY]]"[[The Kroolok]]" establishes that Winda was younger than [[Wicket Wystri Warrick]], who was [[Reproduction|born]] in [[7 BBY]] according to {{Instagram|username=cosbaby|url=p/DIOFf_Hv-mY|name=[[Hot Toys|Cosbaby By Hot Toys]]|date=2025-04-11|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/Le3Tz}}. |death= |species=[[Ewok]]{{StoryCite|story=The Kroolok|book=Life Day Treasury}} |gender=[[Gender|Female]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color|Light gray]][[Ewoks (2024) 4|''Ewoks'' (2024) 4]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=[[Warrick family]] |parents=*[[Deej]] *[[Wicket's mother]] |partners= |siblings=*[[Weechee (Ewok)|Weechee]] *[[Widdle Warrick]] *[[Wicket Wystri Warrick]] |children= |affiliation=[[Bright Tree tribe]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, maybe I should show you what a ''real'' hunter could bring back to the village.''"
"''Who? Like Winda?|Wicket and Weechee|}} '''Winda''' was the youngest [[Ewok]] [[Youngling|child]] of the Ewok [[Deej]] and his [[Wicket's mother|wife]] who was [[Reproduction|born]] no earlier than [[7 BBY]]. They were the younger [[Gender|sister]] of three [[Warrick family|brothers]]: [[Weechee (Ewok)|Weechee]], [[Widdle Warrick]], and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick|Wicket Warrick]]. One [[winter]] on the [[Endor|Forest Moon of Endor]] between [[1 BBY]] and [[4 ABY]],[[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle 4|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' 4]] depicts [[Logray]] before he became [[shaman]] of the [[Bright Tree tribe]] and is dated to [[1 BBY]] by ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]''. "[[One Normal Day]]" depicts [[Wicket Wystri Warrick]] as no longer being a [[wokling]] and takes place and occurs concurrent with the events of {{Film|VI}}, which ''Timelines'' dates to [[4 ABY]]. As "[[The Kroolok]]" depicts Logray as a shaman and Warrick as a wokling, it must take place between these two dates. [[Foodstuff|food]] was scarce for the [[Bright Tree tribe]], and Wicket had to give half of his dinner portion of [[ground-apple stock]] to Winda. During that winter, when Wicket insisted to his older brother Weechee that he could show him a real [[Hunting|hunter]], Weechee jokingly asked if he was speaking of Winda. Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY]],{{Marvel|url=articles/comics/ewoks-comic-series-steve-orlando-alvaro-lopez-laura-braga|text='Ewoks' Comic Series Reveals What Happened to the Battle of Endor's Most Courageous Warriors}} places [[Star Wars: Ewoks (2024)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'']] directly after the events of {{Film|VI}}, which ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates to [[4 ABY]]. several members of the Bright Tree tribe, including Winda, held a gathering with the tribe's neighbors in [[Bright Tree Village]] to decide the [[forest]]'s future. During the gathering, Winda danced with their brother Wicket. Winda had light [[Color|gray]] [[Hair|fur]] and donned two blue [[Plant|leaves]] on their head. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Shodu.png|thumb|right|240px|Winda being held by her mother in the ''Star Wars'' Legends continuity]] Winda appeared in the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in "[[The Kroolok]]," a short story written by [[George Mann]] and [[Cavan Scott]] and published in the [[2021]] short story collection the ''[[Life Day Treasury]]''. Winda then made their first visual appearance in the [[Ewoks (2024) 4|fourth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (2024)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'']] comic book series, which was written by [[Steve Orlando]], illustrated by [[Laura Braga]] and [[Álvaro López]], and published on [[January 29]], [[2025]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/114515/star_wars_ewoks_2024_4|text=Star Wars: Ewoks (2024) #4}} In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, [[Winda Warrick|Winda]] was introduced, albeit unidentified, in the [[1984]] television film, ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]''.''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' Her first name was later revealed in "[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]],"{{Ewoks|Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)}} the sixteenth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], which was written by [[Paul Dini]] and premiered on [[November 15]], [[1986]].{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} She was then given the last name "Warrick" in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.{{CSWECite|III|320|Warrick, Winda}} ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=The Kroolok|book=Life Day Treasury}} {{1st}} *[[Ewoks (2024) 4|''Ewoks'' (2024) 4]] {{1stp}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Winda Warrick}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bright Tree tribe]] [[Category:Ewoks]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]]
